hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q "^src/" && cd /home/tmotoki/pjt/life-event-simulator && python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=short 2>&1 || true'

bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q "^src/domain/" && grep -q "TODO: FPに確認" /home/tmotoki/pjt/life-event-simulator/docs/spec/01_requirements.md 2>/dev/null && echo "警告: docs/spec/01_requirements.md に FP未確認事項が残っています。/fp-check で確認してから実装を進めてください。" || true'
